name: Fleetio Fleet Management API
what_it_does: Fleetio REST API for fleet management platform. Enables AI agents to query vehicle records, retrieve maintenance schedules, access fuel logs, manage driver assignments, and integrate fleet operations data into logistics workflows. Fleetio is known for its modern API-first approach to fleet management, popular with mid-market fleets.
use_cases: Querying vehicle maintenance status and upcoming service schedules from ops agents
Retrieving fuel consumption and efficiency data from fleet cost analytics agents
Managing driver assignments and inspection records from fleet ops automation agents
Integrating fleet data with GPS telematics systems from logistics workflow agents
not_for: Enterprise fleets requiring Geotab or Samsara level telematics
best_when: A mid-market fleet operator using Fleetio wants AI agents to surface maintenance alerts, track fuel costs, and integrate fleet data into logistics and operations workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Driver records and vehicle location data require clear disclosure and consent per employment law. AUTHORIZED USE ONLY for fleet management contexts.

auth.notes: Fleetio Token authentication (Authorization: Token header). API tokens from account settings. Account-scoped access.

pricing.notes: Per-vehicle pricing. Developer-friendly with good API documentation.

performance.rate_limits: Fleetio API: 1,000 req/min; burst limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Driver records require legitimate fleet management authority and disclosure
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Rate limit: 1,000 req/min — well-documented; design agents to respect limit
Fleetio API is well-documented with versioning — check API version header
Vehicle history queries can be large — use date filters and pagination
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Driver records and fleet data require legitimate authority and employee disclosure. SOC2. Token auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY. Driver records and fleet data. SOC2. Employee disclosure required for monitoring.
